appraisal_events.evidence: « ne savait jamais… de quel ton il devait répondre », « un sourire conditionnel et provisoire », « on y voyait flotter perpétuellement une incertitude », « n'était pas plus assuré… en général dans la vie »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator depicts Cottard as chronically unsure of tone and behavior, masking his uncertainty with a defensive, perpetual smile; this characterization locally lowers him as socially and rhetorically maladroit. A closing mitigation (he asks frank questions when permitted) does not outweigh the dominant diminishment.

status_effects.explanation: He is presented as fundamentally uncertain and defensive in social interaction, which lowers local esteem.
